FAT 489(3A), AT 30 3T, 2003 FIIT TR AT AT AT 3T TEq9ATd A 14 ST, 2005 F F1.41. 56(3), AT 19 FEaY, 2007 F F1.31. 253(), A 24 S, 2008 ¥ AT, 1539(aK), AT 29 fwEw, 2009 ¥ FwaT. 3303(w), aTE 27 A, 2011 ¥ 1.3, 2866(aF), ATE 27 f2wav, 2013 ¥ Fr.3m. 3822(31), ATrE 30 fwaw, 2015 F FAT. 3553() T ATETE 4 ST, 2017 F F1.97. 36() FTeT elriara o =m 7565 GI/2018 ) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT, FOREST AND CLIMATE CHANGE NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 26th December, 2018 S.0. 6314(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (1) and (3) of section 3 of the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986 (29 of 1986), the Central Government hereby makes the following further amendment in the Order of the Government of India in the erstwhile Ministry of Environment and Forests, number S.0. 489(E), dated the 30" April, 2003, namely:- In the said Order, in paragraph 1, for the words “for a period of fifteen years and eight months” the words "for a period of seventeen years and eight months™ shall be substituted. [F. No. Z-20018/1/99-CPA] RAVI SHANKAR PRASAD, Jt. Secy. Note: The Principal Order was published in the Gazette of India, vide number S.O. 489(E), dated the 30th April, 2003 and subsequently amended vide numbers S.0. 56(E), dated the 14th January, 2005, S.0. 253(E), dated the 19th February, 2007, S.0O. 1539(E), dated the 24th June, 2008, S.O. 3303(E), dated the 29th December, 2009, S.0. 2866(E), dated the 27th December, 2011, S.0. 3822(E), dated the 27th December, 2013, S.0. 3553(E), dated the 30th December, 2015 and S.0. 36 (E), dated the 4th January, 2017. Uploaded by De. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054.
